rows.label: xs33640100_MSG0010
rows.name: Oh! You were safe as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33640100_MSG0020
rows.name:
I can see the lights of the New White Whale,
but without a Doll, I cannot reach it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33640100_MSG0030
rows.name:
Thus I was at a loss,
wondering what to do. Ha ha ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33640100_MSG0040
rows.name:
Still, those eyes of yours[ST:wide ]— they tell
me you have not given up the fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33640100_MSG0050
rows.name:
As expected of the one I set my sights on. I have
received your will to stand against adversity![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33640100_MSG0060
rows.name:
As long as you possess that spirit, I, Boze Lowes,
shall accompany you to the ends of the universe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33640100_MSG0070
rows.name:
I shall become your spear and scatter
any enemy that stands in our way![ST:wait ]
